summary: Recorded the Linux host-side preflight for the later cross-device video smoke: Nix-runnable host commands, host environment, GPU/driver state, Hyprland and PipeWire availability, host IP/network/firewall state, AV1 sample hash/source, and start/stop command evidence. The live Hyprland lifecycle was unavailable from this shell and is recorded as such; no Mac decode, render, presentation, or latency claim is made.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Linux host command is documented and runnable from Nix.
Host environment, GPU/driver, Hyprland/PipeWire availability, host IP or port, and firewall state are recorded under evidence/m3-linux-video-smoke-host-preflight.
Sample artifact hash and expected stream/sample source are recorded.
Start/stop logs are captured without requiring Mac decode/render.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m3-linux-video-smoke-host-preflight/start-stop.log captures the node-scoped create/remove attempt and records compositor unavailable from this shell.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Evidence explicitly excludes Mac decode, Metal render, Mac presentation, and latency claims.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m3-linux-video-smoke-host-preflight/notes.md and host-preflight-summary.json list explicit excluded claims.

commandsRun.command: host environment, GPU, Hyprland, PipeWire, network, firewall, and sample hash capture commands
nix develop -c cargo run -q -p madobectl -- hello
nix develop -c cargo run -q -p madobectl -- display status
commandsRun.evidence: Command was runnable from Nix but returned compositor unavailable in this shell; see evidence/m3-linux-video-smoke-host-preflight/nix-command-validation.log.

commandsRun.command: nix develop -c cargo run -q -p madobectl -- display create/remove --id madobe-qd-m3-linux-video-smoke-host-preflight
commandsRun.evidence: Start/stop attempt captured; live Hyprland instance unavailable from this shell. See evidence/m3-linux-video-smoke-host-preflight/start-stop.log.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Host preflight evidence was captured on the Linux host. PipeWire services were active and network/firewall state was recorded. Live Hyprland display lifecycle was attempted and recorded as unavailable from this shell because HYPRLAND_INSTANCE_SIGNATURE was unset; no Mac-side validation was attempted or claimed.
